function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap and lane rulebooks; used exact invoice records and line items.
function.outcome_justification: The target line item 'follow-up timeline prototype review' appears in five matched invoices, but 2025-11-03 is before the requested period. In-range line_eur values are 480 (2025-12-01), 240 (2025-12-29), 240 (2026-02-14), and 240 (2026-03-26), summing to 1200.
